title: Bedwars Package
body:
![Bedwars Package Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b36e7cc8156708748287d66a9d7707c24f5521ee_0.webp)


The Bedwars Package is a lightweight Fabric modpack focused on improving performance, visibility, and quality of life for competitive Bedwars gameplay. It provides a clean and stable setup without changing core game mechanics.

Performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Krypton, and ImmediatelyFast ensure smooth gameplay and higher FPS, while Entity Culling reduces unnecessary rendering. Visual improvements such as BetterHurtCam, No Fog, Highlight, and Zoomify enhance clarity and awareness during PvP fights.

Quality-of-life mods like Mouse Tweaks, Better Chat Hide, AppleSkin, Mod Menu, and YACL improve inventory management, reduce distractions, and make configuration easier. The included Bedwars Ultimate resource pack adapts visuals specifically for the Bedwars game mode.

## Credits

A huge thank you to the talented mod developers who made this modpack possible. Each mod contributes to a smoother, clearer, and more comfortable Bedwars experience.

## Disclaimer

The mods included in The Bedwars Package have been carefully selected to comply with the general rules and policies of most Minecraft servers. While we believe all included mods fall within acceptable usage guidelines, some may be considered in a "gray area" depending on server-specific interpretations of the rules.

We recommend players familiarize themselves with the specific rules of the servers they play on to avoid any misunderstandings. The Bedwars Package is provided with the intention of enhancing gameplay while respecting server policies.
